events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求评估热工作安全与索具（Safety & Rigging）在重型工业施工或工艺场地的情况。场景描述说："The work around Hot work is photographed from one angle only. The critical label, torque sheet, or clearance dimension needed for the referenced requirement is outside the frame. Reference material on hand: NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J."

这意味着检查员只看到了一张照片，而关键信息（如标签、扭矩表、间隙尺寸）不在画面内。根据参考标准（NFPA 51B 热工作安全标准，OSHA 1926 建筑安全卫生条例的 J 部分 焊接与切割），我们需要决定是否合规。

在没有看到关键信息的情况下，显然无法确认工作是否合规。因此，合理的决定是“needs_more_info”（需要更多信息）。风险可能为中等或高，因为热工作可能涉及火灾和爆炸风险，但没有具体细节，所以可以说风险是high或medium。工作阶段是“rough-complete”（粗完成，安装或组装但未封闭）。组件条件没有提到，所以空列表。我们需要提供 findings, actions, rationale, references。

因此，决策：needs_more_info。风险：high（因为热工作通常高风险，但不确定）。工作阶段：rough-complete。百分比完成：也许 80-90%（粗完成）。值：无。置信度：中等，0.7。无声音相关。

构建JSON。

注意：输出格式必须严格，不包含markdown。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.7,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Critical label, torque sheet, or clearance dimension required for verification is outside the camera frame, preventing confirmation of compliance with hot work permit conditions."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Inspect the area in person to verify proper labelling, isolation, and permit documentation before allowing hot work to continue.",
    "Ensure a fire watch is posted and combustible materials are moved or shielded per NFPA 51B."
  ],
  "rationale": "With only one angle and the essential compliance markers out of view, it is impossible to confirm that hot work meets OSHA 1926 Subpart J and NFPA 51B requirements. The risk of unverified conditions is high, so more information is mandatory before accepting the work.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 51B: Standard for Fire Prevention During Welding, Cutting, and Other Hot Work",
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart J: Welding and Cutting"
  ]
}
